_doc: apps/mobile/eas.json · EAS build/submit profiles (P-30 release hardening, guide §8). production = release-hardened (Hermes + R8/ProGuard + shrink + cleartext-off via app.config's expo-build-properties), source maps uploaded PRIVATELY to the crash service + stripped from the artifact, APK/AAB under the <30MB budget. Staged rollout 1%->10%->100% with crash-rate gates is configured on the submit/rollout side. Secrets (signing keys, store creds, Sentry auth) live in EAS secrets - NEVER in the repo or the bundle.

production._notes: Release hardening lives in app.config expo-build-properties (Hermes/R8/ProGuard/shrink/cleartext-off). CI uploads source maps to the crash service then they are NOT shipped. Dev menu disabled in release. Dependency audit must be clean to promote.

android._notes: Staged rollout: start 1%, gate on crash-free-session >= 99.5%, then 10% -> 100% (guide §8). Halt/rollback by pausing the rollout or reverting the OTA channel.
